name: Compose — Promotion Purchase Sheet
description: Bottom-sheet purchase / activation flow for the promotion-link affordance — opened from the megaphone icon in [[compose-kr]]'s insert toolbar. Teaches what the item does (preview illustration + description banner) and commits the purchase: two stacked price rows (5-pack with discount + 1-pack baseline) and a primary 'Purchase' / secondary 'Later' action stack at the bottom. Demo strings render English per AGENTS.md rule 7; the canonical Korean source lives in [[patterns/compose_kr_promotion]].
useCases: activate the promotion-link feature for the first time

overlay.note: Triggered from the megaphone `button/icon` in [[compose-kr]]'s insert toolbar. Tall sheet — handle (intrinsic) + left-aligned title at `sys.typo.heading.lg`.

props.body: An item that lets you post URL-containing posts to specific channels. A special label appears in front of the post title so it stands out in the feed.

description.note: Description banner sitting in the sheet's content stack on pale-primary surface with primary foreground. Three-line body explaining what the item does and the resulting feed treatment. Preview illustration above this region is decorative chrome (a mock post card with promotion eyebrow + link card) — modeled in `description.note` rather than as a separate region because it carries no live data.

products.note: Two pricing rows. The 5-pack is the selected/recommended option (outlined in `sys.color.primary`). The 'Bargain' leading tag is modeled as `chip/tag` with `appearance: default` — the canonical Korean pattern uses a warm-yellow tonal tag which is out-of-system; the deviation is documented in [[patterns/compose_kr_promotion]]. Trailing meta '20% OFF' is a red eyebrow on the 5-pack row; trailing price uses a coin glyph + numeric value.

props.title: Please read before purchasing
props.body: Suited for sole proprietors, meetup organizers, and others who want to amplify a post to a wider audience effectively.

disclosure.note: Pre-purchase disclosure banner in the sheet's content stack, beneath the pricing row group. Title + secondary body on a muted surface.

ctaPrimary.note: Primary commit — full-width `button/standard` with `appearance: primary`. Pinned above the safe area at the bottom of the sheet.

ctaSecondary.note: Secondary action — full-width `button/standard` with `appearance: secondary`. Stacked directly under the primary CTA.

rules: Overlay is `bottom-sheet`, not `dialog` — the surface is tall and supports scroll. Its paired trigger is the megaphone `button/icon` in [[compose-kr]]'s toolbar.

The action stack uses two `button/standard` siblings (primary + secondary) rather than the bottom-sheet's `primaryAction`/`secondaryAction` props because purchase commit is the whole purpose of this sheet — full-width stacked CTAs are load-bearing, not chrome.
The preview illustration at the top of the sheet is decorative — do NOT model as a `feed/feed` row. Its role is 'what your post will look like', not 'a real post'.

The 'Bargain' tag is rendered with `chip/tag` `appearance: default` until a warm-yellow tag appearance lands. The canonical Korean source shows yellow; the deviation is acknowledged in the paired pattern.
